sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108039" key="u(phno/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπηνόβῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living by his beard,</tr_> i.e. by bullying, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
